---
title: "Low level vs high level visual prediction processing"
author: "Max Van Migem"
date: "2025-10-03"
---

```{r packages}
library(car)
library(pbkrtest)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(optimx)
library(performance)
library(emmeans)
# library(brms)
# library(rstan)

```
## load data

```{r data}
# df <- read.csv('C:/Users/mvmigem/Documents/data/project_2/compiled_data/p1_amp.csv')
# df <- read.csv('C:/Users/mvmigem/Documents/data/project_2/compiled_data/p2_amp.csv')
# df <- read.csv('C:/Users/mvmigem/Documents/data/project_2/compiled_data/n1_amp.csv')
df <- read.csv('C:/Users/mvmigem/Documents/data/project_2/compiled_data/p3_amp.csv')
```
```{r data}
df$subject <- as.factor(df$subject)
df$feature <- as.factor(df$feature)
df$attended_feature <- as.factor(df$attended_feature)
df$unattended_feature <- as.factor(df$unattended_feature)

options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

```
# P1
```{r}
f1 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature | subject)

f2 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  | subject) # better after bootstrap

fit1 <-  lmer(f1, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))
fit2 <-  lmer(f2, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))

confint(fit.behaviour_acc, method ="boot",nsim = 1000)
summary(fit1)
summary(fit2)
contrasts(df$feature)
contrasts(df$attended_feature)
contrasts(df$unattended_feature)

mean(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)

emmeans(fit1, pairwise ~ unattended_feature | feature)

```
# N1
```{r}
f1 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature | subject)

f2 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + attended_feature | subject) # better after bootstrap

fit1 <-  lmer(f1, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))
fit2 <-  lmer(f2, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))

confint(fit1, method ="boot",nsim = 1000)
summary(fit1)
summary(fit2)
contrasts(df$feature)
contrasts(df$attended_feature)
contrasts(df$unattended_feature)

mean(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)

emmeans(fit1, pairwise ~ unattended_feature | feature)

```
# P2
```{r}
f1 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature | subject)

f2 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + unattended_feature | subject) # better after bootstrapping


fit1 <-  lmer(f1, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))
fit2 <-  lmer(f2, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))
# , control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5))
# control = lmerControl(optimizer ='optimx', optCtrl=list(method='L-BFGS-B'))

confint(fit2, method ="boot",nsim = 1000)
summary(fit1)
summary(fit2)
contrasts(df$feature)
contrasts(df$attended_feature)
contrasts(df$unattended_feature)

mean(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)

emmeans(fit1, pairwise ~ attended_feature | feature)

```
# P3
```{r}
f1 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature | subject)

f2 <- y_bc ~ 1 + feature + attended_feature + unattended_feature  +
                feature*attended_feature*unattended_feature + 
                (1  | subject) # better after bootstrapping


fit1 <-  lmer(f1, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))
fit2 <-  lmer(f2, data = df, control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5)))
# , control = lmerControl(optimizer ='bobyqa', optCtrl=list(maxfun = 1e5))
# control = lmerControl(optimizer ='optimx', optCtrl=list(method='L-BFGS-B'))

confint(fit2, method ="boot",nsim = 1000)
summary(fit1)
summary(fit2)
contrasts(df$feature)
contrasts(df$attended_feature)
contrasts(df$unattended_feature)

mean(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_regular$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(df_odd$beta, na.rm = TRUE)

emmeans(fit1, pairwise ~ attended_feature | feature)

```
```{r}
anova(fit1,fit2)
summary(fit1)
summary(fit2)
plot(fit1)
plot(fit2)
qqnorm(residuals(fit1))
bootstrap|> tidy()
bootstrap <- PBmodcomp(fit1,fit2,nsim=1000)
check_model(fit1)
check_model(fit2)

summary(bootstrap)

```
